## What & why

<!-- What does this change add/fix, and why? Link any related issue. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `make lint` passes (ruff)
- [ ] `make dbt-parse` passes (if dbt models changed)
- [ ] `databricks bundle validate` passes (if the bundle changed)
- [ ] New examples actually run end-to-end (or are clearly marked why not)
- [ ] No secrets committed (see SECURITY.md)
- [ ] Relevant docs / `updates/` notes updated
